title: LengYue work-status SSOT
$comment: Schema for work-actionable item status. As of 2026-06-04 the canonical record is the todo PostgreSQL database (psql -h 192.168.122.1 -d todo), whose relational DDL (tools/work-status/schema.sql) mirrors this schema; docs/work-status.json is the frozen seed it was migrated from, and this file remains the contract reference for fields/enums. docs/TODO.md is a human projection and does NOT independently assert status. The closed enums are amendable (edit the enum deliberately; an unknown VALUE is an error, ADR-0002/ADR-0008). additionalProperties:true at the item level keeps the schema forward-compatible: unknown future FIELDS are tolerated (the DB hoists them into an extra jsonb column), unknown enum VALUES are rejected. License: Public Domain (The Unlicense).

id.$comment: Opaque, stable kebab-slug. Assigned once; never derived from the mutable title or status (status is anti-rigid).

target.$comment: Repo-relative path for doc/source kinds; PR number or commit sha for pr/commit kinds.

description.$comment: Human-readable body. The SSOT's human face. Triggers/rationale live here; a fuller design exploration is a separate design-note referenced via refs.

labels.$comment: GitHub-style multi-valued tags for free specificity (a perf bug = [bug, performance]; an issue is specified by its kind-label, not a top-level issue|feature split). Optional and deliberately NOT a kind-taxonomy — a deep hierarchy invites the ADR-0008 forced-classification trap; these labels are long-lived and battle-tested. Closed-but-amendable: an unknown value is an error (widen the enum deliberately), and the values are disjoint from every other facet enum (the disjointness meta-lint guards it). Leave an item unlabeled rather than force a fuzzy label (ADR-0008 negative register).

allOf.$comment: Open items carry an open-side refinement and no resolution.
Closed items carry a closure reason and a close date, and no open-side disposition.
A shipped item must point at ship evidence (a PR, commit, or worklog). Lenient by design: any one suffices.
